name: Coolant Flush
effect: You may activate this system as a Protocol. Until the end of your next turn, all incoming Tech Attacks have +2 DIFFICULTY to hit you and your Tech Attacks gain +2 Difficulty.
description: Can’t be hacked if they can’t get a signal.

name: Shock Armor
effect: You may activate this system as a Protocol. Until the end of your next turn, when hit by a melee attack while Grappling, the damage is reduced by 2 at a cost of 1 HEAT per attack.
description: Armor heats up, flakes off; pilot stays cool.

effect.detail: Your mech gains the AI tag. +2 knockback on melee attacks. When enemies knocked back by your attacks come into contact with objects, that object takes 5 AP KINETIC damage. If the object is destroyed, a Cone 3 shockwave originates from the target. Targets affected by the area, including the target, take 1d6+1 damage on a failed HULL save.
